---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving the PWA
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

---

## 🤔 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it.

---

## 💡 Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

---

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Have you thought of alternative approaches or features?

---

## 📱 Use Case
Describe how this feature would be useful for you or other users.

---

## 📸 Screenshots or Examples
If applicable, add screenshots, mockups, or examples.

---

## 👥 Additional Context
Add any other context or information about the feature request here.

---

## ✨ Thank You!
Thank you for suggesting improvements! 🙏
